title: Bandos godsword
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Infobox Item |name = Bandos godsword |image = [[File:Bandos godsword.png]] |release = [[17 October]] [[2013]] |update = The God Wars Dungeon has been uncovered! |aka = BGS |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Dismantle, Drop |examine = A brutally heavy sword. |value = 1250000 |weight = 10.000 |exchange = Yes |id = 11804 |leagueRegion = Asgarnia }} [[File:Bandos godsword detail.png|left|130px]] The '''Bandos godsword''' is one of the five variants of the [[Godsword]]; the [[Bandos hilt|hilt]] is received from [[General Graardor]] whilst the blade's shards are attainable from any other boss or boss minion in the [[God Wars Dungeon]]. As with all godsword variants, it requires level 75 [[Attack]] to wield. Players can attach a [[Bandos godsword ornament kit]], obtained from [[master clue scroll]]s, to cosmetically enhance the godsword, creating a [[Bandos godsword (or)]]. This only alters its appearance, and gives no stat enhancements. It also becomes untradeable. The ornament kit can be removed, returning both the godsword and the ornament kit. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = +132 |acrush = +80 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +132 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = +8 |slot = 2h |speed = 6 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = 2h Sword |image = [[File:Bandos godsword equipped.png|130px]] |altimage = [[File:Bandos godsword equipped female.png|130px]] }} {{CombatStyles|2h Sword|speed=6|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Warstrike.gif|thumb|260px|A player uses ''Warstrike'', the Bandos godsword's special attack.]] The Bandos godsword's [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Warstrike'', has doubled accuracy, inflicts 21% more damage and drains the opponent's combat levels equivalent to the damage hit in the following order: [[Defence]], [[Strength]], [[Prayer]], [[Attack]], [[Magic]], [[Ranged]]. ''Warstrike'' consumes 50% of the wielder's special attack energy. ''Warstrike'' rolls against the opponent's slash defence roll. In order for the godsword to drain stats from another category, the current stat that is being drained must hit 0. For example, if a target has 20 Defence, 50 Attack and 20 Prayer and the special attack hits an 80, the target would lose 20 Defence levels, 20 prayer points and 40 Attack levels. Against [[Tekton]], it drains his combat skills by 10 (following the stat drain order) if it fails to hit. The special attack [[animation]]'s colours can be changed to gold, which costs 75 [[Last Man Standing]] points. Once unlocked, the gold trim can be toggled at [[Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing]] whenever the player desires. ==Uses== The special attack is used to reduce the difficulty of various [[boss]] fights. Should the wielder hit high damage using ''Warstrike'', the defence of the boss will be significantly decreased, allowing the rest of the fight to be easier, as more of the player's following attacks will hit. A basic yet effective strategy is to use ''Warstrike'' twice in quick succession; the second iteration of the attack is more likely to hit given its Defence reducing capabilities, and its stat-draining effect is cumulative. Alternatively, in a PvP scenario, ''Warstrike'' can be followed up using a higher-hitting special attack (e.g. [[Armadyl godsword]]) to finish off an opponent after reducing their Defence level. This special attack is more effective against NPC's and players relying on high defence bonuses rather than high defence levels, as losing defence levels quickly renders defence bonus redundant. attack]] energy cost was reduced from 100% to 65%. }} {{Subject changes |date = 19 March 2015 |update = Boss Pets, Sets, Chat & More |poll = Old School Content Poll 30: Near Miss Poll |change = The accurate attack style of the Godswords has been adjusted to use slash rather than crush. As the slash attack bonus on Godswords has always been higher than the crush bonus, having the accurate attack style of the weapons use slash rather than crush means that the accurate attack style takes advantage of the best offensive bonus of the weapon. }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 November 2013 |update = POH updates & weapon tweaks |poll = Old School feature poll 12: Player-designed content |change = *The Accurate combat mode of godswords has been changed from 'Stab' to 'Crush', since godswords have no stab-attack bonus * Godswords will now pop up a confirmation box when you try to dismantle them }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Bandos godsword detail.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Bandos godsword (v1) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Bandos godsword.png|center]] |[[File:Bandos godsword v1.png|center]] |- |17 October 2013 – 6 July 2016

14 July 2016 |} ==Trivia== *The [[Bandos godsword (Misthalin Mystery)|Bandos godsword]] was featured in the [[2016 Halloween event]]; it could be seen laying on a table in the most north-western room of the event mansion. **In [[Misthalin Mystery]], it has a take option for players, but the room containing it is inaccessible. {{Slash weapons}} {{God Wars Dungeon}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Walk animation modifiers]] [[Category:Items subject to Grand Exchange item sink]] [[Category:Defence reduction]]
